steps.title: Use what initial deposit means
steps.content: The graph gives the account balance $y=f(x)$ after $x$ months. The initial deposit is the balance at the start, so use $x=0$ rather than trying to calculate the slope first.

steps.title: Read the y-intercept
steps.content: At $x=0$, the line crosses the vertical axis at $y=40$. That point is $(0,40)$, so the estimated initial account balance was 40 dollars.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The question asks for the initial deposit to the nearest whole dollar. Since $f(0)=40$, the answer is 40.
